arts.ttl: Kai Havertz absence explained as Arsenal striker misses Brentford clash
arts.sum: Kai Havertz has been sidelined with an illness that ruled him out of Wednesday’s Premier League trip to Brentford. Reports that a sickness bug has been going around the Gunners squad emerged earlier in the day and was confirmed by Mikel Arteta ahead of kickoff. arts.ttl: LIVE: Brentford host Arsenal in Premier League
Mikel Arteta explains Kai Havertz absence from Arsenal's Premier League clash with Brentford
arts.sum: Arsenal are without Kai Havertz for their Premier League clash with Brentford on New Year's Day due to illness, Mikel Arteta confirms.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta confirms Kai Havertz and Declan Rice latest after Arsenal sickness bug rumours
arts.sum: Gunners see fitness woes continue ahead of London derby

arts.ttl: Why isn’t Kai Havertz playing for Arsenal against Brentford in the Premier League today?
arts.sum: Already without key man Bukayo Saka, Arsenal head coach Mikel Arteta was dealt another blow in attack for the New Year’s Day Premier League game against Brentford by the surprise absence of forward Kai Havertz. With Saka and Havertz both unavailable, the door has opened for youngster Ethan Nwaneri to make his first Premier League start for The Gunners.

arts.ttl: William Saliba transfer request theory revealed as Real Madrid launch 'silent negotiations'
arts.sum: Speaking to French outlet Ouest-France, as quoted by the Mirror, Mbappe said: "This season, he has become a very important player for Arsenal and is among the best centre-backs in the Premier League. Saliba, who sees his contract at the Emirates Stadium expire in June 2027, has featured 17 times in the Premier League this season, helping the Gunners keep seven clean sheets.

arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Amorim fumes with Rashford as Arsenal consider Man Utd outcast
arts.sum: Man Utd are aware of Rashford’s representatives approaching other clubs and head coach Amorim is said to be particularly frustrated, which is believed to have been a significant factor behind the recent exclusion from the squad. There have been tentative links with Arsenal but we are told that such a move is highly improbable under current circumstances despite the Gunners' recent injuries to Raheem Sterling and Bukayo Saka.

arts.ttl: Why isn’t Bukayo Saka playing for Arsenal against Brentford in the Premier League today?
arts.sum: Arsenal are just about clinging onto the coattails of Premier League leaders Liverpool, who they are nine points behind going into the New Year’s Day game away to Brentford (kickoff at 12:30 p.m ET). Since the start of the 2021/22 season, Saka has scored 56 goals in 162 games in all competitions for the North Londoners and has netted five goals and assisted another 10 in 16 Premier League appearances this season.

arts.ttl: Why Kai Havertz Isn't Playing for Arsenal vs. Brentford on New Year's Day
arts.sum: Kai Havertz was a shock omission from Arsenal's matchday squad against Brentford on New Year's Day.

arts.ttl: Why Kai Havertz isn't playing for Arsenal vs Brentford as Mikel Arteta dealt huge blow
arts.sum: Kai Havertz has not been selected for Arsenal's New Year's Day trip to Brentford due to illness. Havertz has scored seven goals for Arsenal in the league this season, the most of any player in the squad.
